payload.description:
As a score operator, I want to trial a stricter current-medication dosage prompt for Medication Review: Dosage using only supported runtime fields, so that we can measure whether the stakeholder's proposed threshold/prompt framing improves alignment without adding unsupported configuration.

Definition of Done:
- Pull the current champion Dosage YAML locally before editing
- Update only supported fields and prompt content for the stakeholder trial
- Remove fuzzy matching from RelevantWindowsTranscriptFilter for this trial
- Run direct local validation focused on the procedure/score behavior, not CI
- Record results and next steps in Kanbus

Not included:
- Adding new runtime support for unsupported parameters
- Champion promotion or remote push unless explicitly requested
- Broader rubric changes outside the stakeholder trial wording
payload.title: Trial stakeholder dosage prompt/model settings for Medication Review: Dosage
